title: fix(polly): fix bold font key, latex/currency collision, history placeholders
author: fisventurous
pr_body_excerpt:
fixes bold font rendering in tables, stops latex regex from eating currency dollar signs, cleans up history placeholders the AI was parroting, and truncates float-imprecision decimals as observed in [this discord thread](https://ptb.discord.com/channels/885844321461485618/1500964478936809575)

changes
\- fix `_draw_formatted` producing nonexistent `bold_bold` font key - `replace("reg", "bold")` on `"reg_reg"` replaced both occurrences, now limited to first with `count=1`
\- skip non-LaTeX content between dollar signs in `replace_latex_with_unicode` - only process if content contains `\`, `^`, `_`, `{`, or `}`
\- replace generic `[attachment/embed]` in thread and channel history with descriptive labels based on attachment filenames (e.g. `[Attached: table image]`)
\- add `truncate_long_decimals` to clean up float-imprecision artefacts like `0.15000000000000002` → `0.15...`
\- remove dead `detect_latex` import

gist.headline: Polly gets her reading glasses
gist.blurb: Polly the bot just got a nice little tune-up. She's better at reading bold text, knows the difference between money and math, and finally stopped repeating those endlessly long decimals.
gist.summary: Fixed bold font rendering in tables, updated LaTeX parsing to ignore standard currency dollar signs, replaced generic attachment placeholders with descriptive filenames, and added truncation for float-imprecision decimals.
gist.impact: Users interacting with Polly will see correctly formatted bold text and currency, cleaner numbers without floating-point artifacts, and better AI context awareness for attached files.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee wearing reading glasses, looking at a clean chalkboard with math and money symbols, while the Nomnom creature eats messy decimals.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, inspecting a clean digital chalkboard showing dollar signs and neat numbers. The round tan nomnom creature happily eats a pile of messy, long decimals nearby. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
